name: recommendation-system-v4
description: Monorepo for a **GenAI-based movie/show recommendation system**.

scripts.validate:runtime: npm run validate:node && npm run validate:python
scripts.dev:api: cd apps/api && uv run uvicorn index:app --reload
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:https: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web:https"
scripts.lint:api: cd apps/api && uv run ruff check --fix . && uv run ruff format .
scripts.lint:api:check: cd apps/api && uv run ruff check . && uv run ruff format --check .
scripts.check:api: npm run lint:api:check && npm run typecheck:api && npm run test:api
scripts.check:web: npm run lint:web && npm run typecheck:web && npm run test:web
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run check:web && npm run check:api

apps/api/**/*.py: bash -c 'cd apps/api && uv run ruff check --fix "$@"' _
bash -c 'cd apps/api && uv run ruff format "$@"' _
